text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? All this strain is startin' to show on my face.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm appearin' in races, maybe I should
put more effort into my skin care.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can't just wax my face up like I would a
motorcycle...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta use some of that sea cucumber lotion
like Mom does. I bet Scarlet has some.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I definitely don't wanna end up owin' her
anything! Aughhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka continues to worry about the condition of
her skin...
